title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How has remote working changed people's lives?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two aspects of life have been most affected by the shift to remote work.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about how remote working has changed people's lives.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two aspects have been most affected.
